get.description:
Returns a list of agents.
Please note that the property 'LastPatchManagementReceived' is no longer supported and will return a null reference.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional - Page index, based on items per page (default is 1)

parameters.name: itemsInPage
parameters.description: Optional - Number of items per page (default is 20, max is 500)

get.description:

get.description: Returns a list of tickets.

parameters.name: itemsInPage
parameters.description: Optional - Number of items per page (default is 20, max is 50)

parameters.name: includeRelations
parameters.description: Optional - Include ticket relation information (default is false)

post.description:
Creates a new ticket. Requires the enduser contact ID, title, and description.

If you wish to create a new enduser for the ticket then you need to provide:

Contact first name (EndUserFirstName)
Contact last name (EndUserLastName)
Email (EndUserEmail)

get.description: Returns the specified ticket. Requires the ticket ID.

parameters.name: includeRelations
parameters.description: Optional - Include ticket relation information (default is false)

put.summary: Update specified ticket
put.description:
Updates an existing ticket. Requires the ticket ID.

The following fields are editable:

Ticket Title (TicketTitle)
Ticket Status (TicketStatus)
Ticket Type (TicketType)
Ticket Priority (TicketPriority)
Ticket Impact (TicketImpact)
Assigned Technician ID (TechnicianContactID)

post.description:
Updates an existing ticket. Requires the ticket ID.

The following fields are editable:

Ticket Title (TicketTitle)
Ticket Status (TicketStatus)
Ticket Type (TicketType)
Ticket Priority (TicketPriority)
Ticket Impact (TicketImpact)
Assigned Technician ID (TechnicianContactID)

delete.description: Deletes the specified ticket. Requires the ticket ID.

get.description: Returns a list of resolved and closed tickets.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional - Page index (default is 1), based on items per page

parameters.name: itemsInPage
parameters.description: Optional - Number of items per page (default is 20, max is 50)

parameters.name: includeComments
parameters.description: Optional - Include FirstComment, LastEndUserComment, LastTechnicianComment (default is true)

parameters.name: includeRelations
parameters.description: Optional - Include ticket relation information (default is false)

get.description: Returns the specified ticket (billable duration). Requires the ticket ID.

post.description: Returns the tickets (billable duration). Requires the ticket ID's.

parameters.name: ticketIds
parameters.description: Required - List of Ticket IDs (up to 50)

get.description: Returns the specified ticket (non-billable duration). Requires the ticket ID.
Returns a record of the specified ticket's billable and non-billable workhours. Requires the ticket ID.
Returns the ticket's workhours. Requires the ticket ID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional - Page index (default is 1), based on items per page

parameters.name: itemsInPage
parameters.description: Optional - Number of items per page (default is 20, max is 50)

get.description: Returns the ticket comments. Requires the ticket ID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional - Page index (default is 1), based on items per page

parameters.name: itemsInPage
parameters.description: Optional - Number of items per page (default is 20, max is 50)

post.description:
Creates a new comment. Requires comment text and (TechnicianCommentDetails object or EnduserCommentDetails object) and optionally the comment Timestamp in UTC.

If you wish to create a new contact comment for the ticket then you need to provide:

EnduserCommentDetails object with existing enduser contact ID

If you wish to create a new technicain internal comment for the ticket then you need to provide:

TechnicianCommentDetails object with existing technician ID, and IsInternal set to true

If you wish to create a new technicain comment for the ticket then you need to provide:

TechnicianCommentDetails object with existing technician ID, and IsInternal set to false

get.description: Returns the specified ticket's attachments as urls. Requires the ticket ID.
Returns a list of modified tickets.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional - Page index (default is 1), based on items per page

parameters.name: itemsInPage
parameters.description: Optional - Number of items per page (default is 20, max is 50)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional - Ticket's last modified date in UTC (default is today. Recommended format ISO 8601)

parameters.name: includeComments
parameters.description: Optional - Include the ticket's last comments (default is false)

parameters.name: includeRelations
parameters.description: Optional - Include ticket relation information (default is false)

post.summary: Summary billable work hours duration by on customer site and off customer site
post.description: Returns a summary of the specified tickets on-site and off-site workhours duration

parameters.name: ticketIds
parameters.description: Required - List of Ticket IDs (up to 50)
